title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Peptic Ulcers
description: Curcuma longa tinctures contains a concentrated extract of curcumin, a bioactive compound found in turmeric, which is a natural remedy for peptic ulcers. The anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of curcumin help to reduce inflammation and protect the stomach lining from further damage. Curcumin also has antimicrobial properties that can inhibit the growth of H. pylori bacteria, a common cause of peptic ulcers. Additionally, curcumin's ability to reduce oxidative stress and prom...
